scripts.demo:smoke: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx scripts/smoke-happy-path.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx scripts/smoke-failure-paths.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx scripts/tenant-isolation.ts
scripts.demo:smoke:phase5:wrath: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx scripts/reset-org-loads-finance.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx scripts/smoke-phase5-finance-chain-org.ts
scripts.qa:all: bash -c 'pnpm qa:setup && pnpm qa:tests && pnpm qa:smoke; pnpm qa:report'
scripts.platform:smoke:phase4: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:driver && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:driver && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:today && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:today
scripts.platform:smoke:phase6: pnpm platform:smoke:phase3 && pnpm platform:smoke:phase4 && pnpm platform:smoke:phase5 && pnpm demo:smoke && pnpm demo:smoke:roles && pnpm demo:smoke:enforce && pnpm platform:smoke:phase12 && pnpm platform:smoke:phase13
scripts.platform:smoke:phase8: pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:loads && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:trips
scripts.platform:smoke:phase17: pnpm platform:ci:phase16 && pnpm demo:smoke && pnpm demo:smoke:roles
scripts.platform:ci:phase5: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm platform:smoke:phase5
scripts.platform:ci:phase6: pnpm ci:drift && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @truckerio/worker exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run typecheck && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx src/modules/dispatch/queue-view.test.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx src/lib/state-kernel/state-kernel.test.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:kernel && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:driver && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:dispatch && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:loads && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:trips && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:today && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:ux && pnpm platform:smoke:phase6
scripts.platform:ci:phase7: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run typecheck && pnpm platform:smoke:phase7
scripts.platform:ci:phase7a: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run typecheck && pnpm platform:smoke:phase7a
scripts.platform:ci:phase8: pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:loads && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:trips && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run typecheck && pnpm platform:smoke:phase8
scripts.platform:ci:phase9: pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test:finance && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run typecheck && pnpm platform:smoke:phase9
scripts.platform:smoke:phase10: pnpm ci:drift && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:authz && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx src/modules/dispatch/queue-view.test.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec node --import tsx src/lib/state-kernel/state-kernel.test.ts && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api run test:today && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run test
scripts.platform:ci:phase10: pnpm platform:smoke:phase10 && pnpm --filter @truckerio/api exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && pnpm --filter @truckerio/web run typecheck
scripts.platform:ci:godlevel:complete: pnpm platform:ci:phase8 && pnpm platform:ci:phase9 && pnpm platform:ci:phase10 && pnpm platform:ci:phase11 && pnpm platform:ci:phase12 && pnpm platform:ci:phase13 && pnpm platform:ci:phase14 && pnpm platform:ci:phase15
scripts.platform:ci:kernel:phasee: pnpm platform:ci:kernel:phase3 && pnpm demo:smoke:roles && pnpm demo:smoke:enforce
scripts.shipment:all: pnpm shipment:phase1 && pnpm shipment:phase2 && pnpm shipment:phase3 && pnpm shipment:phase4 && pnpm shipment:phase5
